title: ADK Development
description: Build and deploy production-grade multi-agent systems using Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK), adk-web debugging tools, A2A protocols, and interactive A2UI layouts.

courses.title: ADK-101: ADK Foundations
courses.description: Master the basics of Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK). Setup your local environment, install the CLI, configure agent.yaml, and run your first agent.

courses.title: ADK-102: Advanced Configs & Multi-model Setup
courses.description: Dive deep into agent.yaml properties. Configure model backends, safety filters, context parameters, temperature, and tokens.

courses.title: ADK-103: Python & Node.js SDK Bindings
courses.description: Build and initiate ADK agents programmatically using Python and Node.js SDK libraries, intercepting key runner event hooks.

courses.title: ADK-104: Tool Schema Design & Basic APIs
courses.description: Design robust agent tool definitions using strict parameter schemas and type reflections to wrap weather and currency APIs.

courses.title: ADK-201: Developer Tooling & adk-web
courses.description: Inspect and debug active agent runs using the adk-web developer console. Review execution traces, memory states, transaction logs, and step playbacks.

courses.title: ADK-202: Prompt Engineering & Custom System Instructions
courses.description: Write structured instructions, few-shot examples, dynamic templates, and safety rules to guide agent reasoning behavior.

courses.title: ADK-203: Stateful Conversation Memory
courses.description: Implement conversation storage adapters for sliding windows, summarization, Redis caches, and persistent Postgres backends.

courses.title: ADK-204: Local Mocking & Agent Testing
courses.description: Design regression suites, unit test tool integrations, and mock model endpoints to establish robust agent CI/CD pipelines.

courses.title: ADK-301: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Orchestration
courses.description: Design and orchestrate multi-agent collaboration environments. Configure A2AServer routing, launch remote agents, and write discovery card manifests.

courses.title: ADK-302: Intent Classification & Routing Agents
courses.description: Configure router agents to classify semantic intents and dispatch task execution parameters to worker sub-agents.

courses.title: ADK-303: Collaborative Multi-Agent Patterns
courses.description: Master consensus protocols, voting nodes, shared blackboards, and sequential editing chains across agent workgroups.

courses.title: ADK-304: High-Throughput Message Queues for Agents
courses.description: Scale A2A traffic with asynchronous message brokers like RabbitMQ or Kafka, implementing retry policies and DLQs.

courses.title: ADK-401: Dynamic Interfaces with A2UI
courses.description: Create interactive user interfaces generated dynamically by agents. Learn the A2UI schema format to build cards, forms, tables, and secure callbacks.

courses.title: ADK-402: Enterprise Integration & MCP
courses.description: Deploy production agents connected to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, configure OAuth2 integrations, and execute securely inside virtualized sandboxes.

courses.title: ADK-403: Custom A2UI Component Development
courses.description: Build and register bespoke client-side React widgets and charts that compile into sandboxed A2UI rendering frames.

courses.title: ADK-404: Enterprise Sandbox Security & Isolation
courses.description: Isolate agent execution nodes with gVisor, enforce strict syscall filter policies, limit egress connections, and monitor trails.
